p.c: function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool, x3: T0) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool, x3: T0) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or not x1(x3) or x2(x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool, x3: T0) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or not x2(x3) or x1(x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0 -> Bool, x3: T0) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T1) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2, k0) } or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_partial_equivalence[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or x3 ∈ lib(set).equivalence_class[T0](x0, x1) = x3 ∈ lib(set).equivalence_class[T0](x0, x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: T0) { exists(k0: Nat) { x1 ∈ x0(k0) } = x1 ∈ lib(set).seq_union[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or x1 ∈ k0 } } = lib(set).finite_constraint[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool) { not exists(k0: List[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or x1 ∈ k0 } } or lib(set).finite_constraint[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: List[T0]) { not forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 ∈ x1 } or lib(set).finite_constraint[T0](x0) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).JoinSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { (x0 <= x1 and x2 <= x1) = x0.join(x2) <= x1 } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).JoinSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.join(x1) <= x2 or (x0 <= x2 and x1 <= x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x0(x3, x4) or x1(x2(x3), x2(x4)) } = lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x0(x3, x4) or x1(x2(x3), x2(x4)) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x0(k0, k1) and not x1(x2(k0), x2(k1)) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x1(x3, x4) or x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = true } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or forall(x4: T0) { not x1(x3, x4) or x2(x0(x3), x0(x4)) } = true } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x4: T0 -> T1) { not (x0(x1, x2) and not x3(x4(x1), x4(x2))) or not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x4, x0, x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(finite_set).FiniteSet[T1], x1: T1 -> T0, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not forall(x4: T0) { not x4 ∈ lib(finite_fiber_partition).finite_fiber_partition_values[T1, T0](x0, x1) or lib(finite_fiber_partition).finite_fiber_set[T1, T0](x0, x1, x4).cardinality_is(x2) } or not lib(finite_set).fs_image[T1, T0](x0, x1).cardinality_is(x3) or x0.underlying_set.cardinality_is(x2 * x3) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.meet(x1) = x0 = x0 <= x1 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x1(x2, x3) or x3 ∈ x0 } = lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x1(x2, x3) or x3 ∈ x0 } or lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x1) or forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x1(x2, x3) or x3 ∈ x0 } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: T0) { not lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x1) or forall(x3: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or not x1(x2, x3) or x3 ∈ x0 } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x3: T0) { not (x1 ∈ x0 and x2(x1, x3) and not x3 ∈ x0) or not lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x3: T0) { not (x1 ∈ x0 and x2(x1, x3)) or not lib(set).is_saturated_under[T0](x0, x2) or x3 ∈ x0 } }
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { (not x0 or x1) = (x1 or not x0) })
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { not (not x0 and x1) or (x1 and not x0) })
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { not (not x0 and x1) or not x0 })
(forall(x0: Bool) { not (not true and x0) })
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { not (not x0 and x1) or x1 })
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { not (x0 and not x1) or (not x1 and x0) })
(forall(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { not x0 or (not x1 and x0) or x1 })
(forall(x0: Bool) { not x0 and true or x0 })

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { not lib(witness).exists_unique[T0](x0) or x0 != x1 or not x1(x2) or lib(witness).choose_of_exists[T0](x0) = x2 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { forall(x1: Nat) { x0(x1) ⊂ x0(x1.suc) } = lib(set).is_increasing[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x1: Nat) { x0(x1) ⊂ x0(x1.suc) } or lib(set).is_increasing[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not lib(set).is_increasing[T0](x0) or forall(x1: Nat) { x0(x1) ⊂ x0(x1.suc) } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { lib(set).negate_fun[T0](x0, x1) != x0(x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(relation_basic).eq_relation[T0](x0, x1) = (x0 = x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or lib(relation_basic).eq_relation[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { x0.is_finite = lib(finite_set).FiniteSet.constraint[T0](x0) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 = x1 or x0 > x1) = x0 >= x1 } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1], x2: T1) { not forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1(x3) } or x2 ∈ lib(set).list_indexed_intersection[T1, T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1], x2: T1) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1(x3) } = x2 ∈ lib(set).list_indexed_intersection[T1, T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T1], x1: T1 -> lib(set_base).Set[T0], x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ lib(set).list_indexed_intersection[T0, T1](x0, x1) or forall(x3: T1) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1(x3) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1], x3: T1) { not (x1 ∈ x0 and not x3 ∈ x2(x1)) or not x3 ∈ lib(set).list_indexed_intersection[T1, T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: List[lib(set_base).Set[T0]], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { lib(set_list_partition).set_list_union[T0](x0) = x1 = lib(set_list_partition).set_list_exactly_covers[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: List[lib(set_base).Set[T0]], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { lib(set_list_partition).set_list_union[T0](x0) != x1 or lib(set_list_partition).set_list_exactly_covers[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) and lib(order).closed_interval[T0](x1, x2, x3)) = lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0.append(x3), x1, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) and lib(order).closed_interval[T0](x1, x2, x3)) or lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0.append(x3), x1, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0.append(x1), x2, x3) or (lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](x0, x2, x3) and lib(order).closed_interval[T0](x2, x3, x1)) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T2 -> T1, x2: T0 -> T2, x3: T2) { not forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4) = x1(x2(x4)) } or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T2](x2) or lib(relation_transport).function_pushforward[T0, T2, T1](x2, x0, x3) = x1(x3) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T0) { x1(k0) != x2(x0(k0)) } or lib(relation_transport).function_pushforward[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x3) = x2(x3) } }
true and not false
not false
(forall(x0: Bool) { (false and x0) = false })
(forall(x0: Bool) { not (false and x0) or false = true })
(forall(x0: Bool) { not (false and x0) })
(forall(x0: Bool) { not false or (false and x0) })

function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { not exists(k0: T0) { lib(witness).set_witness_predicate[T0](x0, x1, k0) } or x1(lib(witness).choose_from_set_or_default[T0](x0, x1, x2)) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } = lib(order).is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } or lib(order).is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(order).is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } = true } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { not lib(order).is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } = true } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { not (x0 < x1 and not x2(x0) < x2(x1)) or not lib(order).is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, List.cons[T0](x2, List.nil[T0])) = (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, List.cons[T0](x2, List.nil[T0])) or (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) or x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, List.cons[T0](x2, List.nil[T0])) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0], x2: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x3: Nat) { not x3 < x0 or x1(x3) ⊂ x2(x3) } or lib(set).range_indexed_union[T0](x0, x1) ⊂ lib(set).range_indexed_union[T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0], x2: Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Nat) { k0 < x0 and not x1(k0) ⊂ x2(k0) } or lib(set).range_indexed_union[T0](x0, x1) ⊂ lib(set).range_indexed_union[T0](x0, x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or lib(relation_basic).relation_converse[T0, T0](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { (if x0 = x1 { x2 } else { List.cons[T0](x0, x2.remove_one(x1)) }) = List.cons[T0](x0, x2).remove_one(x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { (x0 <= x1 and lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](x2, x0)) = lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](List.cons[T0](x1, x2), x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { not (x0 <= x1 and lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](x2, x0)) or lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](List.cons[T0](x1, x2), x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: T0) { not lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](List.cons[T0](x0, x1), x2) or (x2 <= x0 and lib(list).list_lower_bound[T0](x1, x2)) } }

function[T0: lib(lte).LTE, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, T0.lte)) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, T0.lte)) and lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, T0.lte))) } }

function[T0: lib(lte).LTE, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](T0.lte) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, T0.lte)) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, T0.lte))) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x2: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x3: T0, x4: T1) { lib(relation_basic).relation_union[T0, T1](lib(relation_basic).relation_intersection[T0, T1](x0, x1), lib(relation_basic).relation_intersection[T0, T1](x0, x2), x3, x4) = lib(relation_basic).relation_intersection[T0, T1](x0, lib(relation_basic).relation_union[T0, T1](x1, x2), x3, x4) } }
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 < x1 or 0 = x1 or x2 = x2 })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not x0 < x1 or 0 = x1 or x0 = x0 })
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x3) = x1(x2) } = lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x3) = x1(x2) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x0(k0, k1) and x1(k1) != x1(k0) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) or forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x3) = x1(x2) } = true } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) or forall(x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2) = x1(x3) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0 -> T1) { not (x0(x1, x2) and x3(x1) != x3(x2)) or not lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x3) } }
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Bool) { forall(x2: Nat) { not x2 < x0 or x1(x2) } = lib(nat).true_below(x1, x0) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Bool) { not forall(x2: Nat) { not x2 < x0 or x1(x2) } or lib(nat).true_below(x1, x0) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Bool) { exists(k0: Nat) { k0 < x0 and not x1(k0) } or lib(nat).true_below(x1, x0) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> Bool) { not x0 < x1 or not lib(nat).true_below(x2, x1) or x2(x0) })
